title: Step 1 emits VaultDirectoryNotConfigured with Date.now() — purity-violating and undermines determinism
description: load-vault-config.ts:55-59 emits VaultDirectoryNotConfigured with `occurredOn: { epochMillis: Date.now() }`. This is an undeclared use of the system clock outside of a Clock port, contradicting the verification architecture's port catalog (verification-architecture.md:82-84) which routes all wall-clock access through `Clock.now()`. REQ-015 names Clock.now as a port; calling Date.now directly bypasses the port abstraction and makes the function harder to test deterministically (tests cannot inject a fake clock for the not-configured branch). PROP-014 ('VaultDirectoryNotConfigured emitted exactly once') is checked, but no test asserts that occurredOn comes from the Clock port rather than a hidden Date.now call.
rationale: Phase 2b should add a Clock port to LoadVaultConfigPorts and source occurredOn through it; Phase 2a should add a test that injects a fake clock and asserts VaultDirectoryNotConfigured.occurredOn === clockNow()'s return value.
